content.text:
```mdl
@ Contract: Confidentiality and Non‑Disclosure Agreement Governing the Inspection of Stockholder List
module contract_nli_no_align_dev_14_nda_19

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Types
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
type PartyRole = 
    | Company(unit)
    | Stockholder(unit)

type Party = {
    role: PartyRole,
    name: string,
    # Boolean flags that capture specific duties of a Party
    gave_notice: bool,                     # true when the Party has given the required notice
    agrees_to_jurisdiction: bool,          # true when the Party accepts exclusive Delaware Chancery jurisdiction
    accepts_specific_performance: bool,    # true when the Party acknowledges the Company’s right to specific performance
    can_be_amended_by_written_instrument: bool,   # true when the Party recognises the amendment clause
    is_binding: bool,                      # true when the Party recognises the Agreement as binding
    is_mutually_prepared: bool            # true when the Party recognises the mutual‑preparation clause
}

type ConfidentialMaterial = {
    is_disclosed: bool,    # true when the material has been disclosed to any third party
    is_used: bool,         # true when the material has been used for a purpose other than the permitted inspection
    is_terminated: bool,   # true when the Agreement has been terminated
}

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Entities – stable public objects that can be aligned across standards
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Parties to the Agreement
entity company: Party
entity stockholder: Party

@ The confidential information that is the subject of the Agreement
entity confidential_material: ConfidentialMaterial

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Rules – deontic requirements (O = obligation, F = prohibition, P = permission)
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 1 – material Confidential Material may be used only for purposes reasonably related to the Stockholder’s interests
rule O use_confidential_material:
    not_material.is_used = false always

@ Clause 2 – the Stockholder shall not disclose, publish, or communicate Confidential Material
rule O not_disclose:
    confidential_material.is_disclosed = false always

@ Clause 3 – if disclosure is required by law, the Stockholder must give the Company prompt notice
rule O give_notice_before_disclosure:
    (confidential_material.is_disclosed implies stockholder.gave_notice) always

@ Clause 4 – each Party submits to the exclusive jurisdiction of the Delaware Court of Chancery
rule O jurisdiction:
    (company.agrees_to_jurisdiction and stockholder.agrees_to_jurisdiction) always

@ Clause 5 – the Company may seek specific performance/injunctive relief in case of breach
rule O specific_performance_right:
    (company.accepts_specific_performance and stockholder.accepts_specific_performance) always

@ Clause 6 – the Agreement may be amended only by a written instrument signed by the affected Party
rule O amendment_by_written_instrument:
    (company.can_be_amended_by_written_instrument and stockholder.can_be_amended_by_written_instrument) always

@ Clause 7 – the Agreement is binding upon the Parties and their successors
rule O binding_agreement:
    (company.is_binding and stockholder.is_binding) always

@ Clause 8 – the Agreement is governed by Delaware law
rule O governing_law_delaware:
    true   # (the law is external to the model; the rule records the intent)

@ Clause 9 – the Agreement may be executed in multiple counterparts
rule O multiple_counterparts_allowed:
    true   # (no specific state to model; the rule records the intent)

@ Clause 10 – the Agreement constitutes the entire agreement between the Parties
rule O entire_agreement:
    true   # (no specific state to model; the rule records the intent)

@ Clause 11 – the Agreement is mutually prepared
rule O mutual_preparation:
    (company.is_mutually_prepared and stockholder.is_mutually_prepared) always

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Survival of obligations after termination
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Hypothesis – some obligations survive termination of the Agreement
rule O obligations_survive_termination:
    (confidential_material.is_terminated implies
        (confidential_material.is_disclosed = false always and
         confidential_material.is_used = false always))
```
